LiveView scaffold.description: Full Fitz LiveView scaffold (Phase 2 pattern: type + render + @get + @ws + @server)

Render function.description: A render function that turns state into Html

@get handler.description: HTTP GET handler that returns the initial LiveView HTML

@get handler (embedded live view).description: GET handler that embeds a LiveView (fragment, no full document) inside your own shell/layout

@ws handler.description: WebSocket handler with the event/patch cycle

body: // Lazy-init the snapshot on the first mutation.
Broadcast handler (chat-style).description: WebSocket handler with shared-state broadcast + lazy-init snapshot

flv escape interpolation.description: Escape user-controlled data for safe HTML interpolation

h_when conditional render.description: Render `h` when `cond` is true, otherwise empty string

h_either ternary render.description: Ternary render — pick between two Html values

h_join list of Html.description: Concatenate a mapped list of Html fragments

Button with data-flv-click.description: Button that dispatches a LiveView event on click

Button with click + value payload.description: Button that dispatches an event carrying a value payload (e.g. card_id)

Form with data-flv-submit.description: Form that dispatches an event with named field values

body: // Return type omitted intentionally — Fitz core's @render_for
// checker accepts Str or Any, not the fitz-liveviews Html nominal.
// The framework calls .raw on the returned html(...) at runtime.
// Fitz core v0.20.1+ auto-generates the boot `flv_register(...)`
// call from the decorators above. Every field on the type has a
// default → the compiler synthesizes `$2 {}` as the initial state.
// If you need custom initial state that differs from the
// defaults, write the manual call yourself — it takes precedence:
Live component scaffold (@live_component.description: Full LiveComponent scaffold: type + render + one event handler. Boot registration is auto-generated by Fitz core v0.20.1+.

body: // Return type omitted — Fitz core's @render_for accepts Str or Any,
// not the fitz-liveviews Html nominal. Framework calls .raw at runtime.
@render_for handler.description: @render_for handler — turns a component's state into Html

@on event handler.description: @on handler — takes (state, payload) and returns the new state

Live component instance (parent render).description: Embed a registered live component instance inside a parent template

body: // Component handler already updated its own state.
Dispatch component events at the top of.description: Route a LiveFrame to the matching component handler before your own event branches
